title: Simple email opening
subtitle: Write a tiny polite email.
overview: Read the English aloud, understand the Chinese, then answer with your own real information.

sections.title: A1 focus
rows: Hi Anna, thank you for your message.
How do you start a simple email?
你怎么开始一封简单邮件？
I write, Hi Anna, thank you for your message.
我写：嗨 Anna，谢谢你的信息。

items.en: Hi Anna, thank you for your message.
How do you start a simple email?
items.zh: 你怎么开始一封简单邮件？

items.en: I write, Hi Anna, thank you for your message.
items.zh: 我写：嗨 Anna，谢谢你的信息。

items.en: Now make one sentence about your real life.
items.zh: 现在造一个关于你真实生活的句子。

items.en: Read it aloud three times: slow, clear, natural.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: How do you start a simple email?
lines.zh: 你怎么开始一封简单邮件？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I write, Hi Anna, thank you for your message.
lines.zh: 我写：嗨 Anna，谢谢你的信息。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say it one more time, slowly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I write, Hi Anna, thank you for your message.
lines.zh: 我写：嗨 Anna，谢谢你的信息。

items.en: Hi Anna, thank you for your message.
Change one word and say it again.
Use the sentence today if you can.
items.zh: 如果可以，今天就使用这个句子。
